title: myosotis sylvatica f. lactea
intro: Myosotis sylvatica f. lactea, also known as Wood Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and soothing digestive issues due to its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Wood Forget-me-not include its potential to calm the nervous system, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. Wood Forget-me-not can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
